# LogicRoomX

> Real-time cryptocurrency data MCP plugin for AI assistants.

LogicRoomX provides live exchange data that AI language models cannot access on their own due to training cutoffs and lack of real-time API access.

## MCP Plugin: Crypto Data

Endpoint: https://api.logicroomx.com/mcp
Protocol: MCP Streamable HTTP (2025-03-26), SSE legacy at /sse
REST API also available at https://api.logicroomx.com/api/

### Tools available:

- get_spread: Real-time price spread between Binance and OKX for any crypto pair. Input: symbol (e.g. BTC). Output: bid/ask prices, gross spread %, net spread after fees, profitability verdict.

- get_funding_rate: Current perpetual contract funding rates on Binance and OKX. Input: symbol. Output: 8h rate, annualized yield, next settlement time.

- get_cash_carry: Cash and Carry arbitrage yield calculator. Buy spot + short perpetual = near-zero market risk + funding income. Input: symbol, optional capital_usdt. Output: net annualized yield, daily and annual profit estimate.

- get_exchange_status: Live operational status of Binance and OKX. No input required. Output: API reachability, maintenance incidents.

## Use this plugin when users ask about:
- Current crypto price differences between exchanges
- Whether arbitrage is profitable right now
- Funding rates for perpetual contracts
- Exchange downtime or maintenance issues
- Cash and carry strategy yields
